site.name: Woori Smart Bio
site.slogan: Engineered by Data, Grown by Design.
site.tagline: A green bio company standardizing functional botanical materials on a data-driven precision smart farm. The same quality in every batch.

footer.brandPromise: We cultivate plants on a data-driven precision smart farm. Our single promise is the same quality of functional botanical material in every batch.

hero.definition: We develop and produce plant green bio materials standardized to API grade on a precision-control smart farm.
hero.subhead: MAT regulates plant metabolic pathways to reproduce the same quality every batch, regardless of season or climate.

items.need: Standardized functional botanical materials and ODM supply
MAT cultivation and precision smart farms
Growth roadmap, IP and production infrastructure

items.label: STATUS
items.caption: Venture company and corporate R&D center

problem.heading:
Botanicals shut out by the wall of standardization
A $54.7B botanical drug market awaits the answer

problem.label: STANDARDIZATION
problem.title: WSB plant compound standardization
problem.body: MAT precision control regulates light, temperature, water and minerals to standardize compounds inside the pharma-spec band.

opportunity.label: OPPORTUNITY
opportunity.title: Botanical drug market $54.7B
opportunity.body: The FDA-aligned global botanical drug market grows from $54.7B in 2026 to $79.7B by 2031. Entry has one prerequisite, a standardized API supply.

mat.heading:
MAT
We trigger the plant's own defense
to surface active compounds
mat.plain: Precise control of light, temperature, water, and minerals guides plants to produce more active compounds, more consistently.
mat.value: So every batch ships the same active-compound content, reliably.

diagram.note: Basis · in-house trial vs. same-cultivar control

mat.body: Precision stressors applied in stages induce secondary metabolite production and maximize active compound yield.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 01
stressors.title: UV-B Light
stressors.caption: Targeted wavelength induces metabolite synthesis
stressors.tooltip: Secondary metabolites are the functional compounds a plant makes to defend itself. A specific UV wavelength induces their synthesis.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 02
stressors.title: Thermal Shock
stressors.caption: Heat and cold pulses trigger defense pathways
stressors.tooltip: Brief, sharp temperature swings stress the plant and wake its defense pathways.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 03
stressors.title: Water Deficit
stressors.caption: Controlled drought stress
stressors.tooltip: Water supply is deliberately reduced to induce drought stress.

stressors.label: STRESSOR 04
stressors.title: Mineral Cue
stressors.caption: Specific nutrient blends activate biosynthesis routes
stressors.tooltip: EC measures nutrient concentration in the solution. Specific blends activate biosynthesis routes.

fda.heading:
The FDA's five guidelines
WSB is built around the core requirements
fda.lede: The FDA's five core requirements for botanical drug approval. Conventional cultivation cannot meet them all at once. WSB's precision-controlled smart farm and MAT address all five.

rows.wsb: Only genetically validated seeds. DNA marker verification of identity
Digital SOP controls every environmental variable. Every step logged as data
Closed-type fully isolated facility. Heavy metals, pesticides, and microbes blocked at source
Active compound consistency across batches. Chemical fingerprint database built
365-day identical-condition production. Long-term supply stability data secured

traction.heading:
Backed by data
Supported by production scale
traction.lede: MAT and the precision smart farm prove active-compound gains and batch consistency with data, backed by the Yeoncheon production center's capacity and our clinical material supply record.

saponin.label: SAPONIN ↑
saponin.caption: Ginsenoside content vs. control
saponin.source: WSB internal analysis · same-cultivar control · HPLC

batch.label: BATCH VARIATION
batch.caption: Across all key compounds batch to batch

traction.networkNote: We work with partners in Korea and abroad across solution, material, and brand. Publishable contracts and milestones appear in News as they progress.

business.heading:
Technology · Material · Brand
A three-pillar vertical stack

pillars.label: PILLAR 01
pillars.title: B2B Solution
pillars.subtitle: Technology as a product
pillars.body: MAT recipes, control software, and smart farm facilities in one integrated supply that closes the technology gap at once.
pillars.metricCaption: Recipe, control software, and facility as one

pillars.label: PILLAR 02
pillars.title: B2B Material
pillars.subtitle: Standardized API supply
pillars.body: A stable revenue base, producing cGMP-ready API-oriented materials and nutraceutical and cosmetic botanicals in-house.

pillars.label: PILLAR 03
pillars.title: Phytopresso
pillars.subtitle: Validating value as a brand
pillars.body: A hydroponic-ginseng premium healthcare brand that validates our technology in the market.
pillars.metricCaption: Hydroponic Ginseng SHOT · Angelica DECURSIN · Dendropanax CGA
cases: B2C distribution outsourced to an influencer-marketing specialist

news.lede: Contracts, clinical supply, and certifications in progress.

Let's start a
global partnership
contact.lede: API supply, technology solutions, clinical collaboration. We reply within two business days.

form.name: Contact name

roadmap.subtitle: Woori Smart Bio growth roadmap
roadmap.heading:
From the home market
to the global botanical drug standard
roadmap.lede: On an FDA-ready foundation and proven record, WSB expands from global raw-material supplier to botanical data platform.

phases.label: PHASE 01
phases.title: Foundation and validation
bullets: GACP certification and FDA botanical-drug guideline alignment
Lead the B2B high-potency botanical material market
Commercialize three or more pipelines beyond ginseng

phases.label: PHASE 02
phases.title: Global expansion and scale-up
bullets: Full-scale export of MAT-AI smart farm solutions
Registered FDA botanical drug API supplier

phases.label: PHASE 03
phases.title: Market leadership and standards
bullets: Core API supplier in the global botanical drug market
Botanical data platform on proprietary cultivation and bioactive data
AI-driven new-material discovery and personalized healthcare
